geography: United Kingdom and Republic of Ireland

tam.unit: GBP annual consumer spend across UK+Ireland local food direct-sales channels
tam.calculation: UK farm shops £1,290m (3,400 shops × £380k average revenue) + UK farmers markets £225m (750 markets × £300k) + UK honesty boxes/gate stalls £72m (6,000 sites × £12k) + Republic of Ireland £180m (450 shops × £300k + 350 honesty boxes × £10k). Total: £1,767m.
tam.basis: FRA Annual Review 2023 (farm shop counts), FRA Benchmarking Report 2022 (revenue averages), FARMA census 2022 (farmers markets), Bord Bia Direct Sales Programme 2023 (ROI), DEFRA Farm Business Survey 2022/23 (cross-check; NFU cites £1.2–1.5bn for UK farm retail)

sam.unit: GBP annual revenue potential (realistic subscription revenue from 5,700 addressable listings)
sam.calculation: 5,700 total serviceable listings (3,000 UK farm shops + 2,000 UK honesty boxes + 700 Ireland/NI). At mature 20% Bronze penetration of 3,900 addressable listings: 780 Bronze subscribers × £240 = £187,200/year Bronze. At 4% Silver penetration of 1,700 addressable: 68 Silver shops × £720 + GMV commission ≈ £50,000/year Silver. Total SAM range £250,000–£500,000/year.
sam.basis: FRA Digital Adoption Survey 2022 (3,000 serviceable UK farm shops after excluding 400 self-sufficient large operations); yourhonestybox.com data (honesty box density inference); inference calculations from tam-sam-som.md

som.unit: GBP Year 3 base case annual revenue (single-vertical Farmmap)
som.basis: value-bench.md Year 3 base case; saleability-critique.md conversion rates; pricing-hypothesis.md tier structure

som_year_5_base.unit: GBP Year 5 base case annual revenue (single-vertical, conservative flat GMV)

som_year_5_with_gmv_compounding.unit: GBP Year 5 optimistic (30% annual GMV growth per retained Silver/Gold shop)

som_portfolio_year_5.unit: GBP Year 5 (all 7 verticals at Farmmap-scaled revenue)
som_portfolio_year_5.calculation: Farmmap £450k + BrewMap £315k + CampingMap £540k + BerthMap £135k + FishMap £360k + ForecourtMap £225k + TractorMap £180k = £2,205k
som_portfolio_year_5.basis: value-bench.md portfolio multiplier section; directional only — each vertical requires own analysis

target_segments.segment: UK farm shops with no web presence
target_segments.source: FRA Digital Adoption Survey 2022 (66% of 3,500 shops have no website)

target_segments.segment: UK farm shops with web presence but poor SEO
target_segments.source: Inference — of 1,020 shops with websites, ~690 have inadequate local SEO (AHDB Farm Business Survey 2023: 43% of farm shops have incorrect/stale Google Maps data)

target_segments.segment: UK honesty boxes with digital discovery potential
target_segments.source: Inference — 40% of estimated 5,000 UK honesty box operations are sufficiently established to benefit from directory listing
Inference — 300 serviceable Irish farm shops + 400 serviceable Ireland/NI honesty boxes; yourhonestybox.com data as proxy

financial_model_links.market_assumption: 15% claim rate by Month 12 = 855 claimed listings
6% free-to-Bronze conversion of claimed listings (base case)
